articles.title: The Hillary Clinton graphic that never made it to ‘Late Show’ revealed as Stephen Colbert kicks off final week - New York Post
articles.description: Stephen Colbert spent one of his final episodes behind the “Late Show” desk dredging up 2016 election woes — including unveiling a never-aired Hillary Clinton graphic from 2016.
